title: Demo Baseline Procurement Contract MVP Evaluation Report
executive_summary: This is a simulated demo report for results/demo_baseline. Automatic scoring ran successfully, but human review remains pending and the demo intentionally contains missing concepts, low relation coverage, missing evidence refs, and possible hallucination candidates.

capability_results.notes: Demo task results and fused ontology are schema-valid in machine_score. This is not a real tool grade.
machine_score reports 61 missing evidence refs in the simulated demo; human disposition is pending.
The demo fused output intentionally has low key relation coverage and misses goods receipt/material coverage.

redline_results.description: Human review is pending; final customer-site readiness cannot be concluded.
Demo machine score reports missing evidence references; this is intentional for demo but must be reviewed in real runs.
Possible hallucination candidates require human adjudication.

score_caps.reason: Demo baseline is simulated and not a real AI tool evaluation.

key_findings: score_auto.py discovered 5 task result files, 1 ontology file and 1 evidence file with 0 JSON load errors.
The demo fused ontology is schema-valid but intentionally incomplete.
Machine metrics show concept and attribute coverage are stronger than relation coverage.
Possible hallucination candidates are unmatched items and require human review.
risks: This is a demo sample only and must not be used as a real tool capability grade.
Missing evidence refs may include intentional broken refs and naming mismatches.
Human review has not adjudicated missing evidence refs or possible hallucinations.
Low key relation coverage would be a major risk in a real evaluation.

recommendations.description: Use this report only as an end-to-end example of report structure.
Complete manual_review/manual_review.md before issuing a real final decision.
Review missing evidence refs and possible hallucinations in machine_score.json.

conclusion.rationale: The demo baseline is simulated and human review is pending. It demonstrates the workflow but cannot support a real readiness decision.
next_steps: Use operator_guide/README.md for a real smoke run.
Complete manual review for real evaluations.

provenance.notes: Demo sample only; not a real customer/tool evaluation.
